---
title: "Simulations"
description: "Monte Carlo, agent-based models, stochastic simulations, RL agents, tournament replications."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="simulations"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Simulations</h1>
  <p class="lead">Monte Carlo, agent-based models, stochastic simulations, RL agents, tournament replications.</p>
</div>
```
